Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "ONTHETILES-4400-0800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "On the Tiles.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $4400 which sets $DD01 (CIA#2 Port B) to $24, which was set during the original loading routine and allows the game to run properly.
Note: the tape version of the game starts at $400C (and needs to be dumped here), but the true entry point is actually $0800 just like the disk version.
